Identity.Name: StingDrawingTiers
Identity.Definition: Portability tiers for STING Drawing Types — declares whether a profile is universally portable (T1), needs host-specific visual translation (T2), or is host-only (T3). Used by cross-host applier code to know what to attempt vs what to skip when the active host is not Revit.

Governance.StandardsBasis: STING multi-host architecture; introduced when planning BlenderBIM / ArchiCAD / Tekla coordination

Value.Definition: Universal — paper size, scale, title block params, sheet number / name patterns. Works in every host with full fidelity.
Visual — view template, filters, VG overrides, view style pack. Each host translates as best it can; some fidelity loss expected on non-Revit hosts.
Managed — host-native managed templates (Revit Drawing Type managed mode, ArchiCAD ViewMap binding). Declared nativeOnly: true; non-host plugins skip the apply step with a logged warning.
